title: lepisanthes celebica
intro: Lepisanthes celebica is a plant species belonging to the family Salicaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia, particularly in the Philippines and Malaysia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lepisanthes celebica include treating fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea, infusions, or decoctions, and may also be dried or processed into capsules or tinctures for further use.
